    rw [h4]

have h1 : (smaller pivot l).count x = List.count x (l.filter (fun x' => x' ≤ pivot)) := by
    simp [smaller]
  have h2 : (larger pivot l).count x = List.count x (l.filter (fun x' => pivot < x)) := by
    simp [larger]
  rw [h1, h2]
  have h3 : (l.filter (fun x' => x' ≤ pivot)).count x + (l.filter (fun x' => pivot < x)).count x = l.count x := by
    have h4 : (l.filter (fun x' => x' ≤ pivot)) ∪ (l.filter (fun x' => pivot < x)) = l := by
      ext y
      simp
      <;> omega
    have h5 : Disjoint (l.filter (fun x' => x' ≤ pivot)) (l.filter (fun x' => pivot < x)) := by
      apply List.disjoint_filter_filter
      intro y hy1 hy2
      omega
    rw [← h4]
    rw [List.count_union_eq h5]
  linarith
